title: Exposed Sensitive Data in Logs
description: System logs contain sensitive information, such as user credentials, internal IP addresses, or debugging details, which could be exposed if not properly secured.
attack_vector: Unauthorized access to log files, either through direct access or exploitation of vulnerabilities in the logging mechanism.
mitigations: Implement strict access controls to log files.
Redact or mask sensitive data in logs.
Regularly review and audit log configurations.
